style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial cycle diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A loop of four labelled boxes connected by arrows: ERREUR DÉTECTÉE SUR LE PLATEAU, then RÉTROSPECTIVE, then METTRE À JOUR LE HARNAIS, then POUSSER VERS LA BRANCHE PRINCIPALE, with a final arrow returning to a row of small robot tokens labelled CHAQUE AGENT DÉMARRE DU PLUS RÉCENT. To one side, a small document icon labelled RAPPORT D'AUDIT with a caption INSTANTANÉ DE CE QUI A FONCTIONNÉ. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond simple tokens. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
